stories.headline: Thousands of Brits take the knee in solidarity over Henry Nowak's death in Southampton

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 BREAKING: A powerful wave of solidarity is sweeping social media. Thousands of Brits are honoring Henry Nowak’s tragic death by posting videos of themselves taking a knee.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🚨BREAKING: The “taking the knee” trend has exploded across Britain. Thousands are kneeling for Henry Nowak specifically to the track: Michael Jackson “They Don’t Really Care About Us.” The left are in a complete meltdown.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The Iran War Powers Resolution that I cosponsored (opposing the war) just passed the House of Representatives. The People’s House is sending a message: end this war.

perspectives.label: Democrat

stories.headline: Glazer family considers selling Manchester United stake after 20 years
stories.body: Some members of the billionaire Glazer family have been debating whether to sell their stake in Manchester United FC, after more than 20 years of ownership that has often been blighted by fan protest

stories.headline: OpenAI launches GPT-Rosalind model series for life sciences research
stories.body:
We’re bringing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind, a model series purpose-built for life sciences research at enterprise scale.

It brings GPT-5.5’s agentic coding and tool use together with stronger intelligence for drug discovery, analysis, design, and experimental workflows.

stories.headline: OpenAI releases GPT-Rosalind update with GPT-5.5 agentic features for drug discovery and genomics
stories.body: ⚡️ NOW: OpenAI introduces a new update to GPT-Rosalind, its life sciences model, bringing GPT-5.5 agentic capabilities for drug discovery and genomics research.

stories.headline: Steve Hilton leads in California primary, wins Orange County and other key areas
stories.body: "Steve Hilton won counties that have not voted for a Republican winner in many elections, including Napa County and Sacramento County. Hilton has also carried the populated areas of San Diego County, Fresno County and Orange County."

stories.headline: Tech executive in $35M Orange County mansion charged with illegal scheme supplying Iran military
stories.body: A California tech executive living in a $35 million Orange County mansion has been charged with running a decades-long scheme to illegally supply U.S. computer equipment to Iran’s military and nuclear programs, according to federal prosecutors.

stories.headline: California tech executive in $35M Newport Beach mansion arrested for supplying US tech to Iran
stories.body:
THE ENEMY IS HERE: California tech executive and dual U.S.-Iranian citizen arrested for allegedly running a decades-long scheme to illegally sell critical U.S. computer equipment to Iran’s military and nuclear programs.

The wealthy Orange County businessman, who lived in a $35 million mansion in Newport Beach, is accused of selling components directly to Iran’s Atomic Energy Organization between 2017 and 2023, in violation of U.S. sanctions.

U.S. Attorney: “Aiding our declared enemy… We will hold him accountable by seeking an appropriate prison sentence and seizing his assets, including the $35 million mansion.”

Authorities say this highlights the need for stronger vetting and enforcement of sanctions against those helping adversarial regimes. LOCK HIM UP AND TOSS THE KEYS.

stories.headline: Conspiracy theory that Steam is targeted because Proton enables Linux.
stories.body: The conspiracy theorist in me suspects the real reason they are going after Steam is because proton makes linux more viable as a desktop OS, which is harder for the state to control.
